sources.citation: Patrick Rucker of The Capitol Forum, with Maya Miller and David Armstrong of ProPublica, How Cigna Saves Millions by Having Its Doctors Reject Claims Without Reading Them, 25 March 2023.
sources.use_constraint: Attribute workflow descriptions and figures to the reporting; do not treat them as adjudicated findings.

sources.citation: ProPublica, Cigna Denial System Draws Regulatory and Congressional Scrutiny, 25 April 2023.
sources.use_constraint: Preserve the distinction between criticism, institutional response, and regulatory inquiry.

sources.citation: Kisting-Leung v. Cigna Corp., No. 2:23-cv-01477-DAD-CSK, order granting in part and denying in part the motion to dismiss, E.D. Cal., 31 March 2025, docket 55.
sources.use_constraint: Treat the order as a procedural ruling on pleading sufficiency; do not describe allegations as proven facts or resolved liability.

redistribution_note: The repository freezes source identities, evidentiary tiers, and assessment boundaries. It does not redistribute third-party source files.
